accordion.snippet:
export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => (
    <Accordion type="single" collapsible className="w-80">
      <AccordionItem value="item-1">
        <AccordionTrigger>What is Foundation OS?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          An AI-driven personal operating system with modular workspaces.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
      <AccordionItem value="item-2">
        <AccordionTrigger>What modules are available?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          App Builder is active. Finance and Health are planned.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
      <AccordionItem value="item-3">
        <AccordionTrigger>What is the design system?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          Void Glass — a dark-only design system built on shadcn/ui.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
    </Accordion>
  ),
}

alert-dialog.snippet:
export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => (
    <AlertDialog>
      <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Delete account</Button>
      </AlertDialogTrigger>
      <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
          <AlertDialogDescription>
            This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
          </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
          <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
          <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
      </AlertDialogContent>
    </AlertDialog>
  ),
}

export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => (
    <AlertDialog>
      <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Delete account</Button>
      </AlertDialogTrigger>
      <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
          <AlertDialogDescription>
            This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
          </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
          <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
          <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
      </AlertDialogContent>
    </AlertDialog>
  ),
}

          <SelectItem value="eet">Eastern (UTC+2)</SelectItem>
        </SelectGroup>
      </SelectContent>
    </Select>
  ),
}
